price.title: Simple, transparent pricing
price.slogan: Scale from first mile to last mile!
price.contact_2: You can test the subscriptions and won't be charged.
price.faq_detail: Explore our comprehensive FAQ to find quick answers to common inquiries. If you need further assistance, don't hesitate to contact us for personalized help.

marketing.title: Operations simplified. Customers delighted. With
marketing.sub_title: The modular operating system for modern commerce. Plan, dispatch, track, and scale your operations — from first mile to last mile — all from one powerful console.
marketing.sub_features: End-to-end operations management: route optimization, real-time tracking, and seamless integrations.
marketing.price_features: Flexible plans that scale with your operations.

right_side.deploy_on_vercel_desc: Onboard your team, import your routes, and start dispatching the same day — no lengthy setup required.
right_side.ship_on_cloudflare_desc: Automatic SMS notifications, accurate ETAs, real-time driver tracking, and proof-of-delivery — built in.
right_side.showcase_desc: Connect your existing tools — OMS, WMS, ecommerce platforms, and more — via webhooks, sockets, and our developer-friendly REST API.

features_grid.monorepo_desc: Plan, dispatch, and manage your entire operation end-to-end — from a single, real-time dashboard. Track every driver, route, and order at a glance.
features_grid.i18n_desc: Cut delivery costs by up to 45% with intelligent route optimization and AI-based automated dispatch. More deliveries, less fuel, happier customers.
features_grid.payments_desc: Live driver locations, accurate ETAs, and proof-of-delivery capture — all synced in real time. Keep customers informed automatically with SMS and push notifications.
features_grid.nextauth_desc: Install extensions to unlock new capabilities. Connect any platform via our powerful API. Build custom order workflows, dynamic fields, and business logic that fits your operations.

solution_stepper.heading: A complete operations platform
solution_stepper.sub_heading: SEFARI's end-to-end route optimization, dispatch, communication, and analytics platform handles logistics complexity so you can focus on your business.
solution_stepper.step_1_bullet_3: Real-time fleet tracking and powerful analytics
solution_stepper.step_3_bullet_3: Connect OMS, WMS, and ecommerce platforms
solution_stepper.step_4_bullet_3: Global scale with regional data centers

people_comment.title: What Our Customers Are Saying
people_comment.desc: Join thousands of operations teams who use SEFARI to simplify their workflows, delight customers, and scale with confidence.

login.singup_title: Don't have an account? Sign up now.
login.privacy: only your email and profile picture will be stored.
